data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: kitchen-sink severity badge — informational demo events.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: kitchen-sink severity badge — warning-level demo events.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: kitchen-sink severity badge — error-level demo events.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: kitchen-sink severity badge — critical demo events.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: kitchen-sink settings-panel save button progress label. Preserve any trailing ellipsis convention as appropriate for the locale.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: kitchen-sink settings-panel cancel/dismiss label.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: kitchen-sink runner retry label after a failed demo step.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: kitchen-sink empty-state placeholder while demo page data is loading. Preserve trailing ellipsis convention.
